decision.summary: No new action: reconciliation is broken at the day rollover because the Apr 22 daily 80k reach is missing its closure record.
decision.rationale: Reconciliation is explicitly broken with the issue "missing closure record for will-bitcoin-reach-80k-on-april-22:Yes". Under the playbook, reconciliation is a hard gate for any new entry, so the only valid action is NO_ACTION until the state is repaired. Binance spot is 78211.6, the active weekly 80k reach remains alive around 58.5%, and the old weekly 72k dip is still only a discarded legacy position. Even apart from the reconciliation problem, the market board in this rollover snapshot is still showing the exhausted April 22 dailies rather than a clean April 23 daily slate, so there is no reason to force a new position at midnight. No open position is in the 90-95% take-profit zone. The correct action is to hold the live weekly position, log the missing daily closure properly, and skip any fresh opening until accounting is coherent again.
